SELECT toDecimal64(value, 2) AS converted_value FROM test_decimal;
SELECT toDecimal64(value, 5) AS converted_value FROM test_decimal WHERE converted_value > 0.001;
SELECT toDecimal64(value, 10) AS converted_value, toTypeName(converted_value) AS type FROM test_decimal;
SELECT t1.value AS original_value, toDecimal64(t1.value, 2) AS decimal_value FROM (SELECT '1.23456789' AS value UNION SELECT '2.34567891' UNION SELECT '3.45678912') AS t1;
SELECT toDecimal64(value, 0) AS integer_value FROM test_decimal WHERE value NOT LIKE '%.%';
SELECT toDecimal64(num, 1) FROM example1 WHERE num IS NOT NULL AND num NOT IN (NaN, Inf);
CREATE TABLE example2 (a String, b String);
SELECT toDecimal64(a, 2) + toDecimal64(b, 2) AS total FROM example2;
SELECT toDecimal64(value, 1) AS decimal1, toDecimal64(value, 3) AS decimal3 FROM test_decimal WHERE toDecimal64(value, 3) < 1000;
SELECT SUM(toDecimal64(value, 2)) AS sum_value FROM test_decimal;
CREATE TABLE complex_query_test (id UInt64, value Float64);
SELECT id, toDecimal64(value, 1) AS rounded_value FROM complex_query_test WHERE rounded_value > 2;
